narrative_beat: Selo de cera vermelha rachado com numeral II

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a scroll with a deep red wax seal cracked down the middle on a gothic stone pedestal, with Roman numeral II branded into the wax
subject.focal_point: the cracked II glowing crimson as if still hot
subject.secondary: Low smoke drifts near the base; the wax shows molten edges around the crack
props: red wax seal with Roman numeral II

environment.time_of_day: moment just after seal is opened

composition.foreground: wax seal and numeral in vivid crimson and molten gold
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white empty throne looming behind

mood.emotion: second seal broken as prophetic marker

symbolism.primary: the second seal opening in our own time
symbolism.secondary: numeral II as eternal chronology of judgment

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
